requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC and Power Quality for Networked Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩的OCPP、EMC及电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁的OCPP、EMC及電能質量

summary.en: Official Guyana sources reviewed did not identify a national OCPP mandate for all EV chargers. However, commercial public chargers, fleet chargers and utility-coordinated sites commonly need network monitoring, billing, remote fault management, access control, demand response and load-management functions. GPL's National Grid Code addresses power quality and minimum technical requirements for grid users, while IEC 61000 is the normal international EMC and power-quality family used to evidence conducted/radiated emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker and voltage disturbance performance. For DC chargers using CCS1, the vehicle-side charging communication must follow the CCS / IEC 61851 family specified for the selected connector rather than China GB/T 27930.
summary.zh: 已审阅的圭亚那官方来源未发现适用于所有电动汽车充电桩的全国OCPP强制要求。但商业公共充电桩、车队充电桩和需与公用事业协调的场站，通常需要网络监控、计费、远程故障管理、访问控制、需求响应和负载管理功能。GPL国家电网规范涉及电网用户的电能质量和最低技术要求；IEC 61000通常作为国际EMC及电能质量标准族，用于证明传导/辐射发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪变和电压扰动表现。采用CCS1的直流充电桩，其车端充电通信应遵循所选接口对应的CCS / IEC 61851体系，而非中国GB/T 27930。
summary.zht: 已審閱的圭亞那官方來源未發現適用於所有電動汽車充電樁的全國OCPP強制要求。但商業公共充電樁、車隊充電樁和需與公用事業協調的場站，通常需要網絡監控、計費、遠程故障管理、訪問控制、需求響應和負載管理功能。GPL國家電網規範涉及電網用戶的電能質量和最低技術要求；IEC 61000通常作為國際EMC及電能質量標準族，用於證明傳導/輻射發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃變和電壓擾動表現。採用CCS1的直流充電樁，其車端充電通訊應遵循所選接口對應的CCS / IEC 61851體系，而非中國GB/T 27930。

standards_or_laws: GPL National Grid Code — power quality and minimum technical requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office communication
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 for charger-to-BMS communication over CAN. China network operators may require proprietary or OCPP-like back-office functions, but China domestic protocol evidence does not prove OCPP interoperability, CCS1 vehicle communication, IEC 61000 EMC, or GPL power-quality compatibility. China GB/T connector and protocol choices also differ from the Americas J1772 / CCS1 ecosystem likely to be specified for Guyana projects.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023，通过CAN实现充电机与电池管理系统通信。中国网络运营商可能要求私有或类似OCPP的后台功能，但中国国内协议证据不能证明OCPP互操作、CCS1车辆通信、IEC 61000 EMC或GPL电能质量兼容性。中国GB/T接口和协议选择也不同于圭亚那项目可能指定的美洲J1772 / CCS1生态。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023，通過CAN實現充電機與電池管理系統通訊。中國網絡運營商可能要求私有或類似OCPP的後台功能，但中國國內協議證據不能證明OCPP互操作、CCS1車輛通訊、IEC 61000 EMC或GPL電能質量兼容性。中國GB/T接口和協議選擇也不同於圭亞那項目可能指定的美洲J1772 / CCS1生態。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version and backend certification requested by the Guyana charge-point operator, site owner, or fleet customer; prepare IEC 61000 EMC reports, harmonic current and voltage fluctuation data, surge immunity evidence, load-management functions, and remote monitoring acceptance scripts; and replace GB/T 27930 DC communication with the CCS1-compatible communication stack where CCS1 is specified. A charger with only GB/T DC communication and no documented OCPP/EMC evidence is not ready for networked public charging in Guyana.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认圭亚那充电点运营商、场地方或车队客户要求的OCPP版本和后台认证；准备IEC 61000 EMC报告、谐波电流和电压波动数据、浪涌抗扰证据、负载管理功能及远程监控验收脚本；并在指定CCS1时将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为兼容CCS1的通信栈。仅具备GB/T直流通信且没有OCPP/EMC文件证据的充电桩，不适合圭亚那联网公共充电部署。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認圭亞那充電點運營商、場地方或車隊客戶要求的OCPP版本和後台認證；準備IEC 61000 EMC報告、諧波電流和電壓波動數據、浪湧抗擾證據、負載管理功能及遠程監控驗收腳本；並在指定CCS1時將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為兼容CCS1的通訊棧。僅具備GB/T直流通訊且沒有OCPP/EMC文件證據的充電樁，不適合圭亞那聯網公共充電部署。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where specified by GPL connection review, CPO backend integration, tender, fleet customer, site owner, or EMC/product conformity route; national OCPP mandate not confirmed from official Guyana sources
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP or CCS1 interoperability evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Networked Guyana deployments should be treated as OCPP, IEC 61000 and GPL power-quality projects. GB/T 27930 is China DC vehicle communication evidence, not a substitute for CCS1 or back-office interoperability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圭亚那联网部署应按OCPP、IEC 61000和GPL电能质量项目处理。GB/T 27930是中国直流车端通信证据，不能替代CCS1或后台互操作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 圭亞那聯網部署應按OCPP、IEC 61000和GPL電能質量項目處理。GB/T 27930是中國直流車端通訊證據，不能替代CCS1或後台互操作。
